report.summary: Community growth cycle v6: identified quantum-resistant-crypto-guide, privacy-coins-guide-2026, and clarity-act-crypto-guide as the 3 net-new pages after v5; drafted 8-post quantum threat Twitter thread, privacy coins tweet (delisting paradox hook), CLARITY Act tweet, Discord/Telegram announcement for all 3 guides, and Thursday newsletter section; created 2 SVG social cards (quantum algorithm risk matrix + privacy coin delisting timeline) saved to /public/.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (8 posts): Quantum-Resistant Crypto — hook on 25% of BTC being quantum-exposed, ECDSA vulnerability explained, DARPA/NIST 5-7 year aggressive timeline, NIST finalized standards (ML-KEM/ML-DSA/SLH-DSA), quantum-safe projects (QRL, Abelian, QANplatform), Bitcoin BIP-360/Ethereum post-quantum roadmap, actionable steps for holders today, CTA to /learn/quantum-resistant-crypto-guide

Tweet (2 drafts): Privacy Coins 2026 — Draft A: 288% sector gains hook with Monero ring sig / Zcash zk-SNARK explanation, regulatory tension framing; Draft B (recommended): delisting paradox hook (Coinbase/Kraken/Binance bans yet +288%) targeting XMR/ZEC communities for organic amplification, CTA to /learn/privacy-coins-guide-2026

Tweet (2 drafts): CLARITY Act — Draft A (recommended): direct practical framing (CFTC gets commodities / SEC gets securities / decentralization pathway / DeFi exemptions), CTA to /learn/clarity-act-crypto-guide; Draft B: SEC vs CFTC tension hook with thread format suggestion
Discord/Telegram announcement: all 3 new guides (quantum + privacy + clarity act) with one-liner descriptions and direct URLs, 'no wallet needed' callout

Newsletter section (Thursday send): 3-article deep-dive block — quantum threat ($290B at risk framing), privacy coins (288% despite delistings angle), CLARITY Act (commodity vs security classification impact); Degen Corner hot take connecting quantum threat to privacy coin thesis (Abelian as convergence play)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-quantum-resistant-crypto-guide.svg — 1200×630 social card: algorithm risk matrix (ECDSA/RSA-2048 VULNERABLE red / SHA-256 WEAKENED amber / ML-DSA/SLH-DSA SAFE green), 3 stat pills (25% BTC exposed / 5-7yr aggressive timeline / 3 NIST standards), quantum circuit gate decorative element (top-right), branded glass-morphism surfaces. Saved to /public/

social-privacy-coins-guide-2026.svg — 1200×630 social card: XMR price area chart with delisting event markers (Kraken UK/EU, Binance ban, Coinbase), '+288% through delistings' callout, privacy tech comparison table (Monero ring sigs / Zcash zk-SNARKs / Abelian lattice+zk post-quantum), +288% headline stat badge, privacy eye icon decorative element. Saved to /public/

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 15 — no Google Search Console organic data yet; trajectory model based on content freshness, keyword intent, timeliness, and market narrative signals

Quantum-resistant crypto is a slow-burn but durable narrative: NIST finalized 3 post-quantum standards in 2024-2025, generating ongoing search intent for 'quantum safe crypto', 'is Bitcoin quantum safe', 'post-quantum blockchain'; thread format maximizes share-worthiness among tech-forward crypto audience

Privacy coins are high-controversy = high-organic-amplification: delistings by Coinbase/Kraken/Binance generate natural SEO crossover from exchange-delisting queries; XMR/ZEC communities reliably amplify content that treats privacy tech seriously rather than sensationally

CLARITY Act targets regulatory-aware traders and builders; evergreen content (bill will be referenced for years); also ranks for 'SEC CFTC crypto', 'is [token] a security', 'DeFi regulation 2026' search intent
Net-new pages covered in v6 (not in v5): quantum-resistant-crypto-guide, privacy-coins-guide-2026, clarity-act-crypto-guide
Suggested posting schedule: Sunday PM — quantum thread; Monday — privacy coins tweet (draft B); Tuesday — CLARITY Act tweet (draft A); Thursday — newsletter with all 3
